ns0:entry.ns0:title: cadence-workflow/cadence
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cadence-workflow/cadence
Language: go
Cadence is a distributed, scalable, durable, and highly available orchestration engine to execute asynchronous long-running business logic in a scalable and resilient way.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:

Automation engine to build, test and ship any codebase. Runs locally, in CI, or directly in the cloud

Language: go
An HTTP toolkit for security research.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/go-gitea/gitea

ns0:entry.ns0:title: kenn-io/agentsview
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/kenn-io/agentsview
Language: go
Local-first session search, analytics, insights, and token use statistics for coding agents, supporting Claude Code, Codex, and more than 20 other agents.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: moby/moby
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/moby/moby
Language: go
The Moby Project - a collaborative project for the container ecosystem to assemble container-based systems

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ory/kratos
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ory/kratos
Language: go
Headless cloud-native authentication and identity management written in Go. Scales to a billion+ users. Replace Homegrown, Auth0, Okta, Firebase with better UX and DX. Passkeys, Social Sign In, OIDC, Magic Link, Multi-Factor Auth, SMS, SAML, TOTP, and more. Runs everywhere, runs best on Ory Network.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: runatlantis/atlantis
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/runatlantis/atlantis
Language: go
